title: Neutronite
body:
Why spend so much time finding that Netherite Template that you will **not** EVER eventually find? instead, use two times LESS Netherite Scrap, and some Lapis Lazuli, to get something less valuable.

# USES
  though it might not be able to be used to make a toolset that's just fraudulant diamond gear, it can be used to make a **Fancy Lantern** with a pink firey glow. It can also be used to make a **Boomerang**! It can also be used to make **Neutron Glass**, which is a purple glass block that has all benefits of glass, but with the bonus of a glow
